projects.name: AI Voice Detector
projects.description: Built a CNN on mel spectrograms to classify real vs AI-generated voice clips, reaching 92% test accuracy. Diagnosed and fixed model overfitting with dropout and early stopping. Ran a rigorous generalization test against an unseen voice generator that exposed a real limitation in the model. Deployed a live demo on Streamlit Cloud.

projects.name: LeetCode Explainer
projects.description: Built an AI-powered LeetCode tutor that analyzes attempted solutions, identifies bugs, explains the optimal algorithm, and teaches the underlying CS concept. Features multi-image drag-and-drop screenshot upload and a context-aware follow-up chatbot.

projects.name: AI Resume Tailor
projects.description: Developed a resume tailoring tool that analyzes a resume PDF against a job description and returns rewritten bullet points with explanations. Implemented drag-and-drop PDF upload, structured JSON parsing, and a persistent chat interface.

projects.name: AI Study Buddy
projects.description: Engineered a study assistant that accepts PDF lecture uploads and delivers adaptive concept explanations and Socratic quizzes across a persistent multi-turn chat interface.

projects.name: Sign Language Learning App
projects.description: Developed an interactive application using event-driven programming with structured quiz and practice systems.

leadership.name: UConn Surya - Competitive Collegiate Dance Team
leadership.description: Lead a 20+ member team managing recruitment, scheduling, choreography, and large-scale showcase production logistics.

leadership.name: Rang de Storrs
leadership.description: Developed and maintained the event website and application, managed technical systems including lighting and sound.
